nodes.label: MIDI Input
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI events (note on triggers voice start, note off triggers voice stop, CC triggers onController)

nodes.label: onInit
nodes.description: Runs once at compile time. Declare variables, create UI components.

nodes.label: onVoiceStart
nodes.description: Fires when a new voice starts. Receives voiceIndex. Must return modulation value (0.0-1.0).

nodes.label: onVoiceStop
nodes.description: Fires on note-off. Receives voiceIndex (always 0 in current implementation).

nodes.label: onController
nodes.description: Fires on CC events. Access event via Message object.

nodes.label: onControl
nodes.description: Fires when a UI component value changes. Receives component reference and new value.

nodes.label: Voice Lifecycle
nodes.description: Routes note-on to onVoiceStart, note-off to onVoiceStop, CC to onController.

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Per-voice modulation value (0.0-1.0) returned by onVoiceStart.

nodes.label: Message
nodes.description: API object for reading the current MIDI event.

nodes.label: Synth
nodes.description: API object for controlling the parent synthesiser.
